title: Post-launch feedback loop
use_when: Post-launch feedback loop. Use when the user needs a product workflow for business analysis related to post-launch feedback loop. Trigger terms: pm, feedback-loop, iteration, post-launch, continuous-improvement, business-analysis.
do_not_use_when: Do not use Post-launch feedback loop when the request is mainly a different lifecycle artifact; route to the narrower Productize skill that owns that artifact instead. Do not use it when the user lacks enough context to distinguish facts, assumptions, and decision risk.
output_artifact: Post-launch feedback loop launch learning report with release evidence, feedback, decision, and next iteration
framework_fit: Appropriate when a shipped product or feature needs post-launch feedback synthesis, iteration planning, and learning-loop decisions.
failure_modes: Produces Post-launch feedback loop launch learning report with release evidence, feedback, decision, and next iteration without tying recommendations to the user's Launch & Learn stage, evidence, and decision pressure.
Treats Post-launch feedback loop as generic Discovery advice instead of naming assumptions, missing inputs, risks, and the next validation step.
Fails to route away from Post-launch feedback loop when another Productize skill owns the requested artifact more directly.

examples.prompt: Use $post-launch-feedback-loop to turn this post context into a decision-ready Post-launch feedback loop launch learning report with release evidence, feedback, decision, and next iteration.
examples.expected_artifact: Post-launch feedback loop launch learning report with release evidence, feedback, decision, and next iteration
